_comment: Full pattern-promotion flow for the ZeptoClaw 'openai/' prefix parsing bug. This pattern was confirmed in two separate projects (chimera-prime and zeptoclaw-fork) before being promoted to a cross-project global pattern.

step_0_prereq_lessons_already_exist.title: Same openai-substring routing bug, manifested 9h downtime

args.task: Configure ZeptoClaw model with openai prefix

step_1_check_pattern_stats._note: Will return high/critical risk because both lessons are confirmed in distinct projects.

args.title: Avoid 'openai/' prefix in ZeptoClaw model names
args.description: ZeptoClaw 0.9.2 runtime parses 'openai/' substring as openai provider, but startup code routes it as nvidia. Result: Invalid API Key on every heartbeat. Confirmed in chimera-prime and zeptoclaw-fork — pattern is generalisable.
args.example:
Bad:  nvidia/openai/gpt-oss-120b
Good: nvidia/gpt-oss-120b  OR  moonshotai/kimi-k2.6
